changelog: Fix: Endpoints page — show a clear error banner (with fix instructions) when the UrBackup SQLite DB is unreadable instead of silently showing an empty list
Fix: Endpoints page — fall back to UrBackup HTTP API as client source when the SQLite DB is unavailable (fixes fresh installs / NFS setups where DB permissions differ)
Fix: UrBackup DB connection — reset stale cached connection and retry on reconnect
